data.content: Notification beat-ID clicks currently preserve non-list views, so the detail lightbox never opens off `queues`/`active`. Planned implementation is to fetch the beat on click, classify its workflow phase with `builtinProfileDescriptor` + `workflowStatePhase`, force the route to `queues` or `active`, and keep `beat=` in the same navigation. Coverage should include route-building unit tests plus one browser validation from a non-list screen.
